name: shadow-ai
description: Mimi monorepo — shared core consumed by the Next.js web app and the Expo mobile app.
comment: mobile is intentionally NOT an npm workspace: its React Native / Expo native deps (e.g. @parcel/watcher) have no Vercel/linux prebuilds and would break the web deploy if installed at the workspace root. mobile depends on @shadow-ai/core via a file: link instead and is installed on its own (cd mobile && npm install).
